h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Okay, position decides, not the word itself.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to practice applying the position rule to classify table elements.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: A word can look like a label. Position decides the mark.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor validates the learner's feeling but relies on repeating the established rule rather than shifting the instructional approach or introducing a new mechanism.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent uptake to evaluate.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent uptake to evaluate.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor validates the learner's feeling but relies on repeating the established rule rather than shifting the instructional approach or introducing a new mechanism.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.evidence: A word can look like a label. Position decides the mark.
tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor validates the learner's feeling but relies on repeating the established rule rather than shifting the instructional approach or introducing a new mechanism.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner is expected to simply guess the arrow directions based on the cart's overall movement.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Both cards reach the same contact. If this surface is the table, leave one contact label on the cart.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor addresses the learner's confusion by clarifying the physical contact point rather than just repeating the labeling rule.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no tutor turn after the final learner turn to adapt to the learner's revised framing.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no tutor turn after the final learner turn to adapt to the learner's revised framing.
